title: atractylodes chinensis var. simplicifolia
intro: Atractylodes chinensis var. simplicifolia, also known as simplified white atractylodes or simplified wu zhu yu, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to China. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-bacterial, and anti-fungal activities. The health benefits of Atractylodes chinensis var. simplicifolia include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Atractylodes chinensis var. simplicifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or decoctions for medicinal use.
